name: Six-Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Envelopes (2 oz each) Chicken noodle soup mix
1 cup Fresh or canned tomatoes, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort, rinse, and soak the beans using your preferred method (described below). Soak white and colored beans separately to maintain color integrity.
2. Drain the soaked beans.
3. Cook the onion, celery, carrot, green pepper, parsley, and garlic in butter until soft.
4. Combine the cooked vegetables with the soup mix, 2 quarts of water, bay leaf, fines herbes, and the soaked beans in a large pot.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, about 1 hour or until the beans are tender.
6. Add the chopped tomatoes and season with salt if needed.
7. Serve hot, sprinkled with grated Parmesan cheese.
Makes 1 gallon or about 16 servings.
